---
description: Mute or unmute notifications for a chat.
---

# Mute or unmute a chat

You can turn off notifications for a specific chat by muting it. Muted chats are indicated by a notifications off icon <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="<svg xmlns=&#x22;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#x22; height=&#x22;24px&#x22; viewBox=&#x22;0 -960 960 960&#x22; width=&#x22;24px&#x22; fill=&#x22;#666666&#x22;><path d=&#x22;M160-200v-80h80v-280q0-33 8.5-65t25.5-61l60 60q-7 16-10.5 32.5T320-560v280h248L56-792l56-56 736 736-56 56-146-144H160Zm560-154-80-80v-126q0-66-47-113t-113-47q-26 0-50 8t-44 24l-58-58q20-16 43-28t49-18v-28q0-25 17.5-42.5T480-880q25 0 42.5 17.5T540-820v28q80 20 130 84.5T720-560v206Zm-276-50Zm36 324q-33 0-56.5-23.5T400-160h160q0 33-23.5 56.5T480-80Zm33-481Z&#x22;/></svg>" data-size="line">in your chat list. Once you've muted a chat, you'll continue to receive messages, but you won't receive notifications.

You can also unmute a previously muted chat if you change your mind.&#x20;

### Muting or unmuting a chat

To mute a chat:

1. On the **Chats** page, open the desired chat conversation.
2. Select the actions icon (**•••**) in the right pane, then select **Mute.**
3. In the **Mute notifications** confirmation, select **Mute**. You'll no longer receive any alerts for new messages.

To unmute a chat:

1. Go to the desired chat, then select the actions icon (**•••**).
2. Select **Unmute**.&#x20;
3. In the **Unmute notifications** confirmation, select **Unmute**. The chat is unmuted, and you start receiving alerts again.
